title: The Reason Abu Ja'far Built Baghdad
description: The reason for that is as follows: Tradition has it that at the time when the caliphate devolved upon Abu Ja`far al-Mansur, he built al-Hashimiyyah opposite Madinat Ibn Hubayrah.1094 Between the 1092. Ibrahim's edition, VII, 614, vocalizes this as Mis`ar. 1093.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
